Scoring policy

Starts at 100 per category. High-confidence deductions: critical 30, high 15, medium 5, low 1 points; per-rule cap 30. Weights: integrity 30%, readability 25%, editability 20%, consistency 15%, accessibility 10%. Low-confidence and privacy findings deduct 0 points.
